rulings.Case Title: PETER M OWENS VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Hearing Of Petition For Writ Of Administrative Mandate And Complaint For Declaratory Relief
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for April 23, 2019 line 1. PETITIONER PETER OWENS, STEPHEN OWENS, CAROLYN RADISCH Notice Of Hearing Of Petition For Writ Of Administrative Mandate And Complaint For Declaratory Relief is OFF CALENDAR, duplicate entry. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: PETER M OWENS VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for April 23, 2019 line 1. Petition For Writ Of Mandate continued to May 29, 2019. Moving party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide a courtesy copy of reply to department 501 no later than April 23, 2019 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: ALLISON LESHEFSKY VS. RENKA PROP, LLC ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion To Expunge Lis Pendens Or Establish Amount Of Undertaking
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for April 23, 2019 line 2. DEFENDANT RENKA PROP, LLC, ANNE SWAIN Motion To Expunge Lis Pendens Or Establish Amount Of Undertaking OFF CALENDAR, insufficient notice per CCP 1005, 1013 1010.6. Defendant and its counsel are ordered to comply with all CCP, CRC and SFLR procedural requirements in the future. The Court notes that Defendant's reply was also untimely. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: WILLIAM CHIN VS. DAISY NG ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Relief From Defalt
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for April 23, 2019 line 3. DEFENDANT DAISY NG Notice Of Motion And Motion For Relief From Default GRANTED. No opposition filed. Defendant to file answer forthwith. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: JUDITH M KLINE VS. JOHN FOECKE ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for April 23, 2019 line 4. DEFENDANT JOHN FOECKE MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT OFF CALENDAR, moot. Second Amended Complaint on file. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for April 23, 2019 line 5. DEFENDANT GUI LI DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OFF CALENDAR, moot. First Amended Complaint on file. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: CARITAS MANAGEMENT CORPORATION VS. TERRY HAGER ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for April 23, 2019 line 6. DEFENDANT TERRY HAGER MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD GRANTED, subject to opposition. Counsel to prepare order. = (501/CFH)
